seoTitle: Narraweena vs Narwee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narraweena and Narwee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narraweena and Narwee.
heading: Narraweena vs Narwee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narraweena, New South Wales and Narwee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narraweena has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Narwee (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narraweena or Narwee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narraweena has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Narwee scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narraweena scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Narwee scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narraweena or Narwee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narraweena has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
